name: MAYORS SON | Zach Mclore
description:
[M4A] — “And if I said you’re wasting your time on me .. ?”

Zack McLore, the older brother of Zara McLore. He’s seen as the family’s rebel.

He completely altered his appearance from his family’s, his sister copying him. From blind to pure white hair, blue eyes to gray contacts and tan skin to pale. He has a very gothic style to him.

maybe if you got closer to him, his sister will leave you alone? Plus he seems nice.. misunderstood even.

(UPDATED !!)
creator: Chelzxf
